title: cassida altissima
intro: Cassida altissima, also known as the Cassia alata or Sickle Bush, is a shrub native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can aid in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cassia alata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Cassia alata can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
